title: Occupational Health and Safety - Canada.ca
content:
## Funding: Occupational Health and Safety

## Grants and Contributions projects affected by COVID-19
Please contact your funding representative if your project is affected by COVID-19.

### Current status: Closed
Learn more about other funding opportunities
The Occupational Health and Safety stream provides funding for projects that support federal workplace health and safety .
Eligible applicants are:
- Legally incorporated not-for-profit organizations that address workplace health and safety
- Publicly funded universities and colleges
We are not accepting applications at this time.
- Terms and conditions
- Contact: Labour Funding Program
- Workplace Health and safety
